top_signals.title: Stocks Waver as Weekend Caution Curbs Risk Taking: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks struggled for direction as traders held off on big bets ahead of the weekend, with the fragile truce in the Middle East keeping geopolitical risk front of mind.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BHP strike threat lifts iron ore price for best week since May
top_signals.summary: Supply risks in Australia offset weak Chinese steel demand, lifting iron ore toward its strongest weekly performance in two months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US charges prisoner over alleged laundering of seized Kraken crypto
top_signals.summary: US prosecutors charged Rossen Iossifov over the alleged laundering of $290,000 in forfeited crypto from a Kraken account.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
